title: Lead Import (CR-B): staged upload->validate->approve->import workflow, large-import approval gate, XLSX support
business_reason: CR-A imports synchronously in one call. import_policy.large_import_requires_approval_threshold_rows = 5000 requires an approval gate; the canonical lead_import_lifecycle has staged statuses (uploaded -> validated -> imported) that CR-A collapses. CR-B introduces the staged batch workflow + approval, and adds XLSX parsing.

planned_scope.staged_workflow: Persist the batch at 'uploaded' on file upload; a separate validate step -> 'validated'/'validation_failed' (counts + reports); a separate import/apply step -> 'imported'/'partially_imported'. Cancel -> 'cancelled'. Maps lead_import_lifecycle transitions (workflows.json).
planned_scope.approval_gate: total_rows >= 5000 -> require approval before apply (maker != checker, P3.4); status held until approved.
planned_scope.xlsx: Add an XLSX parser (SheetJS/exceljs dependency decision) so import_format 'xlsx' is supported alongside CSV (currently CSV-only).
planned_scope.source_file: Optionally persist the uploaded file (Supabase storage) and set school_lead_import_batches.source_file (drift-flagged nullable today).

functional: upload -> uploaded; validate -> validated/validation_failed; apply -> imported/partially_imported; cancel -> cancelled
XLSX parses to the same row shape as CSV
security_owasp: A01: approve requires a distinct approver (maker != checker)
A03: XLSX cells validated/escaped same as CSV
concurrency: >=5000 path cannot bypass approval via direct apply
